economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations including office closures, delays in construction projects, and increase in pandemic funding. Six business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including petroleum, property management, and resource limited partnerships.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Six business enterprises (Coast Salish Development Corporation, Thuy'she'num Property Management LP, Ivy Green Petroleum LP, Thuthiqut Resources LP, Thuy'she'num Investments LP, Deer Point Developments LP) accounted for by modified equity method with total investment value of $25,246,309. Four entities fully consolidated: Stu'ate Lelum Secondary School and Chemainus Native College, CMHC Social Housing Program, 1089106 B.C. Ltd., and Stz'uminus Education Society (newly formed during year). Business enterprises use December 31 year-end. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, FNHA, FNESC, Province of BC, Coast Salish Employment and Training Society, and CMHC transfers. Long-term debt note appears truncated in source document.
